title: OEIS A278299: Smallest Complete Polyomino Coloring -- Solver code, data, and figures
description: Simulated annealing solver for OEIS A278299. Matches all 10 known terms a(2) through a(11) proved by prior authors. Computes 6 new constructive upper bounds: a(12) <= 40, a(13) <= 47, a(14) <= 56, a(15) <= 61, a(16) <= 69, a(17) <= 78. Includes solver code (Python/Numba), solution data (JSON), solver run log, and colored figure PDF.
